name: Ricercar
description: Fantasia: a visual fantasia set to music — an audio-reactive glowing particle flow-field (Robert Hodgin Magnetosphere lineage). Thousands of light particles are advected through curl-noise turbulence and audio force fields, each carrying an instrument-family colour (strings blue-violet, brass gold, woodwinds amber, percussion cyan), deposited as additive glowing sprites into an HDR light-trail that decays each frame — the deposit-and-fade trail is the glowing weaving ribbon of light, luminous over a deep/dark ground. Zero-lag band energy drives flow vigour and turbulence; beats scatter the particles outward; instrument-family capture colours them. See docs/presets/RICERCAR_DESIGN.md §FANTASIA REBUILD.
author: Matt
